observations: Blocking triggered — SSE request intercepted by Etap
REGRESSION from v5/v7: URL shows error=invalidThread&id=blocked-c312aa8f
Similar to v6 regression but with more informative error URL
Toast: '이 스레드는 존재하지 않습니다' (This thread does not exist)
Direct markdown_block format (without diff_block patches) invalidated thread creation
Perplexity JS REQUIRES diff_block patches — direct block replacement is rejected
Key insight: content events MUST use diff_block.patches format (JSON Patch ops) for Perplexity to process them
v5/v7 (diff_block approach) at least created a valid thread at /search/blocked-*
The problem is not diff_block format itself but the specific patch operations or paths within it

comparison.vs_016_v6: SIMILAR regression — both break thread creation, v8 shows invalidThread error
comparison.vs_017_v7: REGRESSION — v7 (same as v5) worked correctly

result.recommendation: Stay with v5/v7 diff_block approach. Focus investigation on: (1) exact JSON Patch path for markdown content (/blocks/N/markdown_block/...), (2) 'add' vs 'replace' op for initial content creation, (3) whether blocks array needs specific initialization before content patch. Consider comparing exact patch paths character-by-character against HAR original.
